profiles.label: DOPE Projected Feed Balanced
profiles.description: Balanced Quest profile for the projected-feed Colorama quad scene. Keeps the effect stable without pushing the headset to the highest CPU and GPU levels.

profiles.label: DOPE Projected Feed Quality
profiles.description: Higher Quest performance profile for the projected-feed Colorama quad scene when the operator wants more headroom for the multi-layer overlay pass.

profiles.label: Rusty DOPE Colorama Balanced
profiles.description: Quest profile for the Rust/Makepad Colorama feedback-border build. Mirrors the stable tested launch path: lower XR render/buffer scale, fixed multisampling, no dataset capture, and the custom passthrough scene.
